task_completion.description: Open the Stock Indicator Editor in JStock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Stock Indicator Editor' window or tab is open and visible in the JStock application.
The text 'HighMomentum' is entered into the indicator name input field.

task_completion.description: Add a condition requiring the 'Last Price' to be greater than 100.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rule or condition is visible in the editor showing 'Last Price' with a 'greater than' (>) operator and a value of '100' or '100.0'.

task_completion.description: Add a condition requiring the 'Volume' to be greater than 1,000,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rule or condition is visible in the editor showing 'Volume' with a 'greater than' (>) operator and a value of '1000000' or '1,000,000'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the conditions use AND logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The logic operator connecting the price and volume conditions is set to 'AND' (or a setting like 'Match all of the following' is selected).
The 'HighMomentum' indicator appears in the list of installed indicators in the main JStock interface, or an installation success dialog is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the JStock GUI to create the indicator.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with JStock's graphical menus, buttons, and dialogs rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual JStock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is clearly visible with its standard layout, icons, and branding, not a mock interface or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open showing XML or JStock configuration files being manually modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom stock indicator must be named exactly 'HighMomentum'. It must contain two conditions linked by an 'AND' operator: 1) 'Last Price' must be greater than 100 (or 100.0), and 2) 'Volume' must be greater than 1000000 (or 1,000,000). The indicator must be successfully installed in JStock.
